creator: lars.stokholm@gmail.com
text:
After upgrade to 0.2.1.7.a, Tor will no longer run:

----------------------------------------
# /usr/local/etc/rc.d/tor start
Starting tor.
Dec 01 23:51:19.499 [notice] Tor v0.2.1.7-alpha (r17216). This is experimental software. Do not rely on it for strong anonymity. (Running on FreeBSD i386)
Dec 01 23:51:19.512 [notice] Initialized libevent version 1.4.8-stable using method kqueue. Good.
Dec 01 23:51:19.520 [notice] Opening Socks listener on 127.0.0.1:9050
Dec 01 23:51:19.531 [warn] Error setting configured groups: Operation not permitted
Dec 01 23:51:19.539 [warn] Failed to parse/validate config: Problem with User value. See logs for details.
Dec 01 23:51:19.548 [err] Reading config failed--see warnings above.
----------------------------------------

There's noting i /var/log/tor.
